hypothesis: Add price change flag feature: binary indicator of whether sell_price dropped vs last week (lag_7 of price). This is a strong promotional signal — price drops tend to cause demand spikes. Also add price_drop_flag (binary: price < lag_7 price) and price_drop_pct (magnitude of drop). Based on exp_0052 which succeeded with price change flag at WRMSSE=0.94453, building on best run exp_0044 at 0.94391.
